Brett

Brett

The biggest community meme coin on Chains

ETH has Pepe, AVAX has Landwolf and WORLD has Brett.

Claim

The mascot of Chains

Brett is tired of watching his boys Pepe and Landwolf have all the fun. Pepe has conquered the Ethereum blockchain, and Landwolf is making waves on the Avalanche blockchain. Brett has decided to lay his claim on Chains, and he will not rest until he overtakes his fellow friends.

Brett is here to make Chains great. Brett will overtake them all. No presale, no taxes, fair stealth launch. Powered by premium Memecoin fuel, the $BRETT rocket has launched, and it will not stop.

Unlike sam he's here to stay.

Brett on it.

Claim

Use Phantom Wallet

Download Phantom or your wallet of choice from the app store or google play store for free. Desktop users, download the google chrome extension by going to phantom.app

Get some Chains

Have WORLD in your wallet to switch to $BRETT. If you don’t have any WORLD, you can buy directly on Phantom, transfer from another wallet, bridge from any chain, or buy on another exchange and send it to your wallet.

Go to Jupiter

Connect to Jupiter or your favourite AMM on Chains. Go to jup.ag in your web browser or on the browser inside your Phantom app. Connect your wallet. Choose WORLD in the "You're paying" section. Paste the $BRETT token address into the "To receive" section. Confirm via your wallet and when it prompts you for a wallet signature, sign.

Switch WORLD for $BRETT

Switch WORLD for $BRETT. We have ZERO taxes so you don’t need to worry about buying with a specific slippage, although you may need to use slippage during times of market volatility.

No BS

Token Supply:
1,000,000,000

No Taxes. It's that simple. ​ LP tokens are burnt and contract ownership is renounced.

Contact

$BRETT coin has no association with Matt Furie or his creation Brett. This token is simply paying homage to a meme we all love and recognize.

$BRETT is a meme coin with no intrinsic value or expectation of financial return. There is no formal team or roadmap. the coin is completely useless and for entertainment purposes only.
